name: Doodlytical
tagline: Why we think, feel, and act the way we do — in about 15 minutes.
description:
Doodlytical explains psychology, human behavior, and the hidden reasons behind everyday habits — in clear ~15-minute stick-figure videos. No jargon. No fluff. Just why your brain does what it does.

We cover motivation, anxiety, procrastination, relationships, self-sabotage, discipline, sleep, stress, and the science of how people think, feel, and act. Each video breaks one big topic into a story you can actually follow.

New psychology explainers weekly.

Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/@doodlytical
